base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of fireball_projectile_palette_variants — a projectile from 1986 legend of zelda. Fireball projectile — 4 color palettes. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Fireball projectile — 4 color palettes; used by various enemies (Aquamentus / Dodongo / Gleeok) to attack Link. Travels in straight line from enemy
